name: Shakira
bio: Shakira's catalog continues to monetize globally through streaming, multilingual crossover appeal, and persistent playlist demand.
notable_for: Worldwide pop songs with durable rhythmic identity and replay value.
career_highlight: Her crossover catalog remains one of the strongest long-tail assets in modern Latin-pop adjacent music.
revenue_drivers: Global streaming keeps core singles active across markets.
Dance and workout playlists support repeat listening.
International recognition helps maintain long-tail demand.
